What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

free consultation, birth doula support, sibling doula, birth photography, childbirth education

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Keep consults, birth clients, and photo clients on one board instead of separate email threads.
  • Track sibling-doula add-ons and class enrollment without a second spreadsheet.
  • Keep birth-story gallery delivery and postpartum follow-up attached to the same family record.
